import.geminiUnavailable: The AI service is temporarily unavailable due to high demand. Please try again in a few minutes.
import.title: Import Statement
import.subtitleWithPronoun: Dear {pronoun}, import bank statements to catalog transactions from previous periods.
import.subtitle: Import bank statements to catalog transactions from previous periods.
import.geminiInfo: Gemini AI reads your statement PDF and extracts all transactions automatically. Works with any bank.
import.dragPdf: Drag the PDF or click to select
import.anyBankPdf: Statement from any bank in PDF
import.step1: 1. Upload the statement PDF (exported from your bank app)
import.step2: 2. Gemini AI reads and extracts all transactions
import.step3: 3. You review, edit types (revenue/expense) and confirm
import.step4: Requires GEMINI_API_KEY set in .env.local
import.noTransactions: No transactions found in the file. Check the format and selected bank.
import.selectPdf: Select a PDF file to continue.
import.pdfBlockError: Could not process the PDF in blocks. Try splitting the statement or exporting in smaller periods.
import.detectedBank: The OFX file was recognized as {bank}. This bank's specific heuristics were applied automatically.
import.itauSkipTitle: Do not apply Itaú PIX rule
import.itauSkipDesc: Itaú statements (OFX 102) often mark everything as CREDIT. By default, we treat PIX TRANSF lines (except yields/refunds) as expenses. Check here if you receive PIX with this description and prefer to classify everything as income in the modal.
import.dragFile: Drag the file or click to select
import.formatCsv: CSV — Nubank, Inter and generic format
import.formatOfx: OFX / QFX — Itaú, Bradesco, Banco do Brasil, Santander, Caixa and others (bank auto-detected)
import.periodHint: The imported period is what appears in the file (DTSTART / DTEND in OFX). For months outside the range, generate a new statement at your bank.
import.reviewHint: After processing, you can review, edit and confirm each transaction before importing.
import.error.serverProcess: Could not process this PDF on the server. Confirm GEMINI_API_KEY on Vercel or use OFX/CSV.
import.error.invalidFile: Invalid file. Please upload a PDF.
import.error.noTransactionsExtract: Could not extract transactions from the statement.
import.error.noValidTransactions: No valid transactions found in the statement.
import.error.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size: 10 MB.
import.error.noTextHint: PDF has no selectable text (common with scanned statements). Set GEMINI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY on Vercel (Production) and redeploy, or export OFX/CSV from your bank.
import.error.layoutHint: Layout not recognized. With a Gemini key on Vercel (+ redeploy) AI can help; or use OFX/CSV.
import.error.revenuesFailed: Error importing income. Please try again.
import.error.expensesFailed: Error importing expenses. Please try again.
import.api.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
import.api.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported file format. Use CSV, OFX or QFX.
import.api.unexpected: Unexpected error while processing the file.
